title: Drawing Closer
originalTitle: 余命一年の僕が、余命半年の君と出会った話。
tmdbOverview: With only a year left to live, 17-year-old Akito finds new meaning in life by bringing joy to a terminally ill girl who has just six months remaining.
synopsis: Drawing Closer is a 2024 romance and drama film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
